items.name: squash_delicata
items.label: delicata squash
items.note: bake at 350F for 50min; can eat skin!

items.name: squash_kabocha
items.label: kabocha squash
items.note: bake at 400F for 30-35min; can eat skin!; avg weight research: 1349g, 800g

items.name: squash_spaghetti
items.label: spaghetti squash
items.note: bake at 400F for 30-60min, til tender and fluff; avg weight research: 1082g (had 89g of skin)

items.name: brussel_sprouts
items.label: brussel sprouts
items.note: 400F for 35-40 min. Use 24g olive oil + 1/2 tsp of salt and pepper each with 16oz brussel sprouts.

items.name: shishito
items.label: shishito
items.note: Ark Foods Shishito Peppers Party Pack

items.name: sweet_potato_asian
items.label: asian sweet potato
items.note: 45-55 min at 430F on baking pan. Turn halfway.

items.name: beef_short_rib
items.label: beef short rib
items.note:
(choice); Research: 
6oz bone per 25.12oz total raw meat. 
4.6oz bone per 22.72oz total raw meat (2 ribs)
 7.9oz bone per 24.8oz total raw meat.

items.name: beef_lateral_rib
items.label: beef lateral rib
items.note: Based off beef short rib chuck (choice). Research: 8.6oz bone per 41.08 oz total raw meat

items.name: goat
items.label: goat
items.note: For bone-in stew meat, research: 1.52lb total has 6.2oz bone. 1.91lb total has 7.7oz bone.

items.note:
(Lamb, leg, shank half, separable lean and fat, trimmed to 1/4" fat, choice, raw).

items.name: lean_lamb_shoulder
items.label: lean lamb shoulder

items.name: pork_neck_bone
items.label: pork neck bone
items.note:
each bone is about 85.5 cal? 3 bones is about 1 lb???. 
Research: 26.12oz (5bones). 23oz (5 bones).
